item.title: Wok the Duck owners devastated after South Australian government earmarks site for demolition
item.description: The owners were only given 24 hours’ notice before the state government announced the decision.

item.title: Connor Murphy: The truth about gold injections, why doctors used them and why experts warn against it
item.description: Claims of ‘superpowers’ have revived questions about gold’s surprising role in medicine.

item.title: West Indies cricket legend Sir Garfield Sobers dies aged 89
item.description: ‘There are champions ... then there are those rare individuals who redefine the meaning of greatness.’

item.title: Australian golfer Lucas Herbert leads British Open and in it to win it
item.description: The 30-year-old is now facing the biggest weekend of his life and admits he’s feeling anxious.

item.title: Bad memories: Wallabies on alert for Italy clash
item.description: Australia have lost twice in a row to Italy, but the Wallabies are vowing to make amends in Perth in a bid to farewell coach Joe Schmidt in style.

item.title: Smartraveller warns Australians to exercise ‘high degree of caution’ in Laos after shock alcohol poisoning punishments
item.description: Australian teenagers Bianca Jones and Holly Morton-Bowles died after consuming a deadly batch of alcohol in 2024.

item.title: On-the-spot fine for controversial camping in Noosa carparks hiked up to $345
item.description: The punishment costs about as much as a week of legal, unpowered camping.

item.title: Cricket world reacts to death of much-loved icon Sir Garfield Sobers
item.description: ‘He didn’t say anything. He did not need to. There was no ego. His walk let the opposition know he was there for business.’

item.title: Golf superstar Bryson DeChambeau to play on in British Open despite fury over rule breach: ‘Don’t agree with it’
item.description: The 32-year-old has addressed reports that he might quit the tournament after being penalised for a serious rule breach.

item.title: Hooded immigration officers pin Australian to the ground in dramatic arrest at Las Vegas Airport
item.description: A statement from the immigration agency said they abandoned the arrest when ‘a crowd of anti-ICE agitators surrounded officers’.

item.title: The Issue: Master Builders Australia CEO on receiving death threats as industry grapples with CFMEU revelations
item.description: The CEO of Master Builders Australia has broken her silence on 7NEWS’ The Issue on the harrowing time she was targeted at her private home.

item.title: Donald Trump threatens higher tariffs after accusing Canada over ‘unacceptable’ wildfire smoke
item.description: Heavy smoke has blanketed much of the nation with the president kicking off a bitter war of words over ‘willful negligence’.

item.title: Can you spot an AI deepfake? Researchers say they can train people to tell what is real and what is not
item.description: Images created by artificial intelligence are harder to detect than many believe. Here is what you need to look out for.

item.title: Sideline brawl erupts in Wallabies coach Joe Schmidt’s big farewell victory over Italy
item.description: The referee dished out a red card as the Aussies’ second-worst coaching tenure ended on a high.

item.title: Aussie underdog Lucas Herbert pulls off miracle shot to remain in British Open hunt
item.description: ‘I think that’s the best shot I’ve ever hit.’

item.title: Rory McIlroy slams Bryson DeChambeau for ‘performative’ antics after penalty drama
item.description: Rory McIlroy has accused Bryson DeChambeau of ‘holding the tournament hostage’ in an attention-seeking act.

item.title: History as Ken Hinkley confirmed as Tasmania’s inaugural AFL coach
item.description: The Devils have locked in their man with an official announcement expected on Monday.

item.title: Aussie basketball coach Sandy Brondello cops WNBA ban for using common footy term
item.description: ‘I regret that my words caused hurt to a community I respect so deeply.’

item.title: ‘Horrible’ discovery as anti-Indian content spreads on Facebook and Instagram
item.description: An Indian-Australian engineer started documented racist abuse online, with disturbing results.

item.title: Is Facebook down?: Social media website Facebook suffers major global outage on desktop devices
item.description: Thousands of Facebook users have been blocked from accessing their accounts on the social media network’s desktop website.

item.title: Australian expert tells how to navigate grief after loss
item.description: Four months after saying goodbye, Mel Schilling’s husband Gareth posted a touching tribute.

item.description: Scarlett revealed the secret WhatsApp group that has helped her through the harsh criticism.

item.title: Bobby Hill begins talks with Collingwood over ending contract
item.description: The Norm Smith medallist is open to continuing his career at another club.

item.description: ‘These recommendations offer real-life actions that will reduce dementia risk.’

item.description: Joey Manu has been out of the NRL since 2024 but a shock return could be on the cards.

item.title: Bali tattoo spelling blunder leaves Australian tourist red-faced
item.description: It took eight hours to get the ink etched across his chest — but there was one cringe-worthy mistake.

item.description: Lionel Messi is his team’s only player who hasn’t been slammed for ‘embarrassing’ post-match antics.

item.title: Queensland family welcomes ‘one-in-15-million’ identical quadruplets
item.description: The naturally conceived birth is so rare doctors believe it may be an Australian first.

item.title: Keir Starmer resigns as British prime minister, King Charles invites new Labour leader Andy Burnham to form government
item.description: Andy Burnham is set to become Britain’s seventh prime minister in a decade.

item.title: Pauline Hanson boasts about one of the worst attendance records in Parliament
item.description: Official records reveal the One Nation leader has missed the equivalent of one full year of parliamentary sittings.

item.description: The American was handed a two-shot penalty during the second round.

item.description: ‘Meaghan can no longer fight for her children, so we will fight for her.’

item.description: The World Health Organisation revealed almost 50 per cent of cases could be prevented with everyday lifestyle changes.

item.title: Spotlight | 7NEWS
item.description: The latest in Spotlight

item.title: The Morning Show: Australia's no. 1 Morning TV Show - Channel 7 | 7NEWS
item.description: The Morning Show with Larry Emdur and Kylie Gillies is the latest news, lifestyle, recipes, entertainment and weather. The Morning Show brings you a mix of news, entertainment, lifestyle and human interest stories - Weekdays from 9:00am across Australia.

item.title: Sunrise: Australia's No. 1 Breakfast Show - Channel 7 | 7NEWS
item.description: Sunrise with Natalie Barr, Matt Shirvington, Edwina Bartholomew, Sam Mac and Mark Beretta is the latest news, sport, entertainment and weather. Win with the Cash Cow. Australia's most popular brekky show - Weekdays from 5:30am, weekends from 7am on Channel 7.

item.title: Former child star Kaylee Hottle dies age 18 in horror car crash
item.description: The deaf actor was best known for her starring role in two ‘Godzilla’ films.

item.title: Middle East war: Donald Trump says US will strike Iranian nuclear site Pickaxe Mountain ‘soon’
item.description: It comes after the deaths of US soldiers just days into the conflict reigniting.

item.title: Ken Hinkley shuts down Kane Cornes’ first Tasmania Devils question: ‘No’
item.description: The Devils coach could only laugh, even before his former protege had finished talking.

item.title: Ryanair: Man sucked out of plane window, Ljubisa Karović, details ‘explosion’ moments before flight terror
item.description: A passenger who was half sucked out of a plane window has spoken about the terrifying ordeal for the first time, saying the mid-air emergency haunts him.

item.title: US war in Iran has cost $A53 billion so far, Hegseth confirms in Senate grilling
item.description: The Secretary of War told a Senate hearing in Washington the figure included anticipated costs through to September.

item.title: Australia’s ‘Doctor Jihad’ found alive in Iraqi Prison years after suspected death alongside ISIS troops
item.description: He was presumed to have been killed during a bloody battle in Syria almost a decade ago.

item.title: Teen boy charged after mother killed and sister critically injured
item.description: The 16-year-old boy will face court on Wednesday over the ‘suspected family violence homicide’.

item.title: Essendon football director Ted Richards has awkward encounter with James Hird mid-interview
item.description: The popular AFL figure was speaking to 7NEWS when ‘the last thing he expected’ actually happened.

item.title: Yellowstone National Park: Uproar as ‘oblivious’ tourists filmed committing dangerous act at natural landmark
item.description: Two tourists have caused outrage after they risked their lives and jail time at an iconic natural wonder.

item.title: Mystery solved: Plane wreck found after crash that killed dozens 74 years ago
item.description: A vintage Pan Am plane that went missing in 1952 has been found after a seven year search.

item.title: Housing minister steps in as Queensland quadruplet mum loses government rental assistance
item.description: The housing minister stepped in after the family were told they were not eligible due to the GoFundMe donations.

item.title: Australia’s new marathon record-holder Haftu Strintzos eyes off ‘ultimate’ goal to contend at championship events
item.description: The 26-year-old admits he ‘can’t get too comfortable’ at the top - but he’s also ready to go global.

item.title: 2027 Mercedes-Benz GLS: Facelifted three-row SUV range priced for Australia, including AMG and Maybach versions
item.description: Mercedes-Benz's facelifted GLS lineup is available to order now, with a new base grade and a more powerful Maybach flagship.

item.title: 2027 Mercedes-Benz GLE: Updated large SUV range priced for Australia, including AMG versions
item.description: Mercedes-Benz's facelifted GLE lineup includes a new base engine and new tech, in addition to its fresh new look inside and out.

item.title: One Nation distances itself from senator Malcolm Roberts over claim COVID deaths were ‘staged’
item.description: ‘We didn’t realise until fairly recently that those were all staged. They’re bull---t.’

item.title: Range Rover EVs confirmed for 2027 launch in Australia
item.description: The all-electric versions of the Range Rover and Range Rover Sport luxury SUVs have been locked in for an Australian arrival next year.

item.title: Crows coach Matthew Nicks sends warning to fans ahead of Izak Rankine’s first Pies clash since ban
item.description: ‘It’s obvious from a personal point of view for Izak, it may be something.’

item.title: Socceroos icon Paul Wade opens up on ‘probable’ chronic traumatic encephalopathy diagnosis
item.description: ‘There is something wrong here ...’

item.title: Barnaby Joyce responds after yelling at his dog during interview
item.description: The One Nation MP said his dog got ‘under his skin’ during the interview.

item.title: International student charged over alleged $5 million GST refund fraud involving luxury watches
item.description: High-end timepieces, $270,000 in cash and more than 20 trips to China are at the centre of the allegations.

item.title: Husband relives frantic final moments before Kingston house fire killed wife and lifelong friend
item.description: ‘I thought she was three metres behind me. I thought she would just come down the stairs.’

item.title: 2026 Mazda CX-80 prices: Diesels, PHEVs more affordable than before
item.description: Diesel-powered Mazda CX-80s are cheaper than before, now priced identically to petrols, while PHEVs are now just $5000 more.

item.title: Aussie sprinter Torrie Lewis takes down five-time Olympic champ Elaine Thompson-Herah in new national record
item.description: There were just 0.2 seconds between the top three in what was a perfect Commonwealth Games tune-up.

item.title: Plane narrowly avoids disaster as it scrapes along tarmac at Cincinnati airport
item.description: The video shows sparks flying from the fuselage as the plane tried to land at a US airport.

item.title: Xpeng GX: Zeekr 9X-rivalling flagship SUV confirmed for Australia
item.description: While it announced a slew of new models arriving imminently, Xpeng has also confirmed its largest SUV will arrive here at some point in the future.

item.title: Pauline Hanson says domestic violence a ‘two-way street’, victims ‘shouldn’t put up with it’
item.description: The One Nation leader’s comments come as new data reveals the cost victims face to leave a violent home.

item.title: Bunker bust: Hydroponic cannabis set-up allegedly found hidden under trapdoor at rural Adelaide property
item.description: A car, trailer, caravan and even an excavator were also seized.

item.title: 'Truth teller' Rebel Wilson cleared in defamation case brought by Australian actor Charlotte MacInnes
item.description: The Hollywood star has scored a major victory.

item.title: High fuel prices have permanently changed the way millions of Australians live
item.description: Five months after the Iran conflict sent fuel prices soaring, many households have no plans to go back.

item.title: Bruce McAvaney makes shock Cam Myers prediction for Commonwealth Games ‘Miracle Mile’ event
item.description: ‘I think he’s going to pull off a miracle.’

item.title: Celeste Rivas: Grim details revealed in singer D4vd’s alleged teen killing and dismemberment
item.description: D4vd is accused of stabbing the 14-year-old girl and cutting her body apart in his garage using chainsaws.

item.title: Cronulla Sharks keen to debunk narrative around NRL credentials
item.description: ‘We know what our footy looks like, and the identity we want to be playing with.’

item.title: Origin Energy investigates alleged cyber attack after hacker claims to have stolen data of two million customers in ransom bid
item.description: The alleged hacker has started a countdown, warning what will happen when the clock reaches zero.

item.title: Woman obsessed with true crime and Annette Mason’s murder started relationship with suspect to solve cold case, Queensland coroner hears
item.description: ‘I know that it is a big risk and I know my life could have been ended any time but I just took it in my own hands.’

item.title: Collingwood champion Steele Sidebottom expected to retire at season’s end after glittering career
item.description: Attention will quickly turn to two fellow Collingwood veterans with decisions to make on their futures.
